questions.prompt:
An algorithm is required to keep adding integers entered by the user until the total reaches at least 100.

Write a Python program to:
  • set the running total to 0
  • repeat this process while the total is less than 100
  • inside the loop, prompt the user to enter an integer and add it to the total
  • output the final total in an appropriate message
questions.explanation:
Format:
total = 0
while total < 100:
    num = int(input('Enter a number: '))
    total += num
print('Total:', total)
